content: Claude Code headless = 'claude -p <prompt>' (print mode), reads prompt from arg or stdin, runs to completion non-interactively, exits with status code. Use --output-format json for structured output (fields: type, subtype, result, session_id, total_cost_usd, duration_ms, num_turns) or stream-json for NDJSON event stream. result holds model text. Pipe transcript in via stdin, parse JSON out. Replaces older --headless flag.
